Related Entities

  • hospital HCA FLORIDA CITRUS HOSPITAL 2-star overall rating

  • snf AVANTE AT INVERNESS INC 4-star, 104 beds
  • snf CRYSTAL RIVER HEALTH AND REHABILITATION CENTER 4-star, 150 beds
  • snf CYPRESS COVE CARE CENTER 5-star, 120 beds
  • snf AVIATA AT BRENTWOOD 1-star, 120 beds
  • snf DIAMOND RIDGE HEALTH AND REHABILITATION CENTER 5-star, 142 beds
  • snf ARBOR TRAIL REHAB AND SKILLED NURSING CENTER 4-star, 116 beds
  • snf CITRUS HEALTH AND REHABILITATION CENTER 4-star, 111 beds
  • snf LIFE CARE CENTER OF CITRUS COUNTY 5-star, 120 beds

Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
